prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A soft warm dawn light falls across a clean white-and-deep-red robe and a calm living face, the dark receding behind; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
The risen Christ stands alive, robed in a clean white tunic and deep-red mantle, his bearded face calm and living, his open hands turned to show the healed scars of the nails, soft dawn light around him and the dark of the tomb receding behind. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the risen Christ standing, robed, hands open showing the scars.

Cut to mid framing — the upper body and calm living face.

Cut to close-up — the calm, living face.

Cut to insert — an open hand showing the healed nail-scar.

Cut to insert — the other open scarred hand.

Cut to lower framing — the white-and-red robe falling in folds.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the risen Christ standing alive.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Living, quiet triumph.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — risen Christ standing, robed, hands open showing the scars
Cut to mid framing — upper body and calm living face
Cut to close-up — the calm, living face
Cut to insert — an open hand showing the healed nail-scar
Cut to insert — the other open scarred hand
Cut to lower framing — the white-and-red robe in folds
Return to full composition, end hold on the risen Christ standing alive
